title: $OLD_ASKMESS
text: $OLD_ASKMESS Handle askmess statements as in V5.1. $OLD_ASKMESS Defaults Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description In a character mode application, the setting $OLD_ASKMESS causes ProcScript askmess statements to be handled on the message line, as in V5.1, rather than in a dialog box. Omitting the $OLD_ASKMESS setting causes the askmess statement to be handled in the standard manner, via a dialog box. This setting is useful only for character mode ( $GUI=$CHR ).
